Description:


This RFI will aid the CHP in identifying potential software solutions available to meet the objectives of CISS. Once RFI responses are received, they will be reviewed by the CHP. Invitations may be sent to respondents to participate in demonstrations and pilots and will be based on the completeness and relevance of the RFI response.
